description: Scan docs/ directory and count total number of markdown files. Output a simple markdown report listing all markdown files with their line counts.
Scan cmd/ directory for .go files and count them. Also count packages in pkg/ directory. Output as plain markdown.
Use search_file tool to find all TODO comments in cmd/, pkg/, internal/ directories. Create a markdown report with sections: TODO Comments, TODO Pattern Analysis.
Review all evidence report artifacts generated (useful-001 through useful-006) and synthesize into a cohesive executive summary. Output to /tmp/zen-brain1-mlq-run/final/executive-summary.md.
